title: Info Sessions around the Southeast
excerpt: Learn about the magic of Camp Barney Medintz! Meet our directors, learn what to expect, hear about our beautiful 540-acre campus, and have all your camp questions answered! contentHtml:
Learn about the magic of Camp Barney Medintz! Meet our directors, learn what to expect, hear about our beautiful 540-acre campus, and have all your camp questions answered! All prospective, new, or returning campers and parents are welcome!

FAQs

Will my camper feel out of place not being from Atlanta?
Absolutely not! While the majority of our campers do come from the Atlanta area, each summer we welcome hundreds of campers from cities throughout the United States and world.

How would my camper get to camp?
As we get closer to camp, we will update this page with more information.
contentText:
Learn about the magic of Camp Barney Medintz! Meet our directors, learn what to expect, hear about our beautiful 540-acre campus, and have all your camp questions answered! All prospective, new, or returning campers and parents are welcome!

FAQs

Will my camper feel out of place not being from Atlanta?

Absolutely not! While the majority of our campers do come from the Atlanta area, each summer we welcome hundreds of campers from cities throughout the United States and world.

How would my camper get to camp?

As we get closer to camp, we will update 
this page
 with more information.
